violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *. Eggs being stored above RTE and Beef. Removed to the bottom shelf in Reach-in-cooler.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Many items through out not dated.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Handle on utensil needs to be replaced, found melted.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler needs to be cleaned. - Fans in walk-in need to be cleaned.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need test strips for new acid sanitizer.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Togo items found on floor in storage area.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Paper towel dispenser found with out paper towels.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - floors in walk-in needs to be cleaned.
Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items - on cook line covers for lights missing.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
